description: StoryFlow enforcement hooks — pre-commit gate, auto-sync on commit, real context loading. Actions execute directly; the agent cannot bypass them.

hooks.prompt:
Before approving stop, verify ALL of the following. If StoryFlow was never loaded or is offline, approve immediately. Otherwise block until every item is done:
1. Session saved with full context: `storyflow sessions save --summary '...' --next-steps '...' --key-decisions '...' --work-done '...' --learnings '...'` must have been called. Include --issues-created, --issues-updated, and --wiki-pages-updated if applicable. If not saved yet, block and do it now.
2. Board reconciled: check if any In Progress issues were actually completed this session. Use `storyflow issues batch-done <key1> <key2> ...` for multiple. If unsure, use `storyflow search '<topic>' --json` to find relevant issues.
3. Hot wash and lessons reconciled: if any phase was completed or any hot wash changed this session, run `storyflow phases hot-wash lessons --json` and verify the project-level Lessons Learned rollup reflects the current state. If a phase report should exist but does not, generate/finalize it now.
4. Wiki audited: run `storyflow pages audit --json`. If core pages are missing, run `storyflow pages ensure-core`. If core pages are stale or significant new knowledge was learned (architecture decisions, conventions, debugging findings, new subsystems), update the relevant page now — not later.
5. AI status idle: the command hook handles this automatically.
